tagline: AI-Powered WhatsApp Safety Companion for Solo Travelers

challenge.headline: Fragmented travel info leaves solo travelers exposed
challenge.description: Solo travelers relied on multiple scattered sources to gather destination-specific guidance, making it time-consuming and stressful to access critical information quickly. This fragmented approach created unnecessary friction and overwhelm during the moments travelers needed support most.

result.headline: Travelers explore with confidence, not anxiety
result.quote: By reducing friction in accessing travel-related information, Alertora helps users make more informed decisions and approach unfamiliar situations with greater confidence.
